name: Ed Barlow
tagline: Software engineer, database architect, and published author. Building thoughtful systems for complex problems.
home_html:
Current Project: The GAME Framework for Agentic Development

I have combined my Process Based Methodology and scale-proven Technology Rules into an agentic developer Framework.

The concept is exciting. Contact me if you want to collaborate.

Summary: LLMs enable developers to create quickly. The creations differ and do not work together. This code provides a best practice stack and a framework to "conformed" projects such that they work todgether.

Key Concept: Annotations and Scripts expose project capabilities in a uniform way - no impact to your code.

Key Concept: Agent can enforce best practices, branding, and security - easily customized defaults provided (its text)

Key Concept: A Capability Catalog disovers project capabilities and advertises these as a complete tools catalog (MCP for python)

Key Concept: Capabilities include services, data, and servers. You can share your technologies securely and can use team capabilities in Agentic Devlopment.

Key Concept: Conformed code is enables an enterprise command center with enterprise features like Logging, Monitoring & Alerting, Scheduling, Pipelines...

The GAME Framework contains

  • A Command Center provides namespaced views into your projects.
  • A Capability Catalog broadcasts/shares your tooling in a "MCP for python" manner (transport agnostic: REST, CLI, Async, MCP)
  • A Prototyper enables context aware reproducible builds from base specifications for home developers
  • Simple Workflows enable control of your projects and change management

OUT OF THE BOX Enterprise Operations

Monitoring, Documentation, Scheduled tasks, Security, Data Flows, and Sharing of your "STUFF".

Who I am

Hands On Backend Technology Leader at hedge funds, investment banks, insurance companies, and startups

Author, Speaker, Free Software Developer
